title: 0402 Management Executive /School/Tan Kah Kee
description:
School name

National Junior College

Contract period

Contract Period: For 1 year from 19 March 2026 to 18 March 2027.

Working hour

  • Mondays to Thursdays: 9:00am to 6:00pm, inclusive of 30 minutes lunch break.
  • Fridays: 9:00am to 5:30pm, inclusive of 30 minutes lunch break.
  • Service not required on Saturdays, Sundays and gazetted public holidays.

Job scopes

The Services required are set out as follows:

Management Executive Administrative duties include:

  1. Admissions:Senior High (April end July), Junior High (Mid-April to End August, December) Admissions Officer – Direct School Admission (DSA) for Junior High (JH) & Senior High (SH).Conceptualises the process, registration website, database of students, informing students and parents of test date, preparation for selection interview, compile final list, assist VP/Year Heads in answering and writing replies to parents and students.Assist VP/Year Head with Direct School Admission (DSA) /Joint Admission Exercise (JAE) appeal matters and student enrolments for returning Singaporean/International students.
  2. Junior High Student Matters:Health (Mar to Apr) & dental screening (Feb), National Registration Identity Card (NRIC), Quality of School Experience (QSE) survey (July) – To conceptualise and co-ordinate based on students’ time-table and informing personal mentors.Conceptualised Junior High Parent-Teacher Meetings (PTM) (Apr, June, July)3rd language updates and liaising with Language centreSec 1 posting exercise (End Nov to Dec)Junior High1 Orientation: JanSchool tour/Open house: Assist VP/Year Heads with website registration, school list analysis
  3. Parents Support relations:Support Parent-In-Action (PAACT) with logistics for AGM, Parent-In-Action (PAACT) Executive Committee meetings, Principal-parent Meeting, teachers’ day celebration, coordinating PAACT membership registration during Junior High1 Orientation and informing parents of school events, updates from MOE etc.PAACT Fund Liaising with PAACT on printing, assignment and distribution of donation cards, parent registration etc.
  4. Others:Learners engagement survey (by Semester)Cover reception duty from 4 p.m. to 6 p.m. dailyVerification of students with HR agenciesPrinting of Name Cards.International Student Perception SurveyCovering duty of reception duty and Student Services Centre (SSC) when required.
  5. Development projects: Signage, donor board & partnership board.
  6. Ad Hoc admin. duties:Assist in PTM & School Tours (on actual day)Assisting in DSA JH & SH admission (Registration on actual day), e-mails & phone enquiries related to admissions)

Requirements

Qualification, Skill & Experience of the Contractor’s Personnel

The Personnel shall minimally have the following qualifications, skills and experience:

  • Good communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Good team player with a high level of initiative and independence.
  • Proficient in MS Office.
  • Candidate with minimum 2 years working experience in schools.
  • Qualification: A Degree Holder or equivalent.
  • Able to work in a fast paced environment.

Maxhunt Resource Pte Ltd | EA Licence: 22C1322Cynthia Lai | Registration No: R25146301

postedCompany.description:
MaxhuntResource Pte Ltd specialize in identifying, sourcing, shortlisting, and interviewing candidates for jobs ( either permanent, temporary or contract staff ) within an organization.

•Our mission is to be a leader in the manpower placement service industry, providing efficient, cost effective and timely personal manpower solutions to our clients.

•Our philosophy is to provide total quality and service solutions. We recognize that people are the backbone of our business whether they be our clients, our applicants or our staffs.

•Our company goal is to gain recognition for our staffing solutions, to discover new opportunities for growth, to support customers’ work-life is our value. Aside from business, we also put great effort to contribute for a better society.
postedCompany.name: MAXHUNT RESOURCE PTE. LTD.
